codeReview.summary: Implementation satisfies the feature scope: shared library guidance was updated from switcher-centric framing to dual-subsystem coverage with explicit token-accounting, reconciliation/backfill, and indexing context. The updated architecture and user-testing docs now provide mission-relevant references for token-accounting workers without removing switcher guidance.

summary: Reviewed handoff, transcript skeleton, skill procedure, and commit diff for misc-refresh-token-accounting-library-guidance. Changes are scoped to .factory/library guidance files and meet expected behavior with no blocking or non-blocking defects identified.
